lines.english: Why was the Ambassador particularly lucky?
lines.raw: Why was the Ambassador particularly lucky? | 为什么大使特别幸运？

lines.english: When the Ambassador of Escalopia returned home for lunch, his wife got a shock.
lines.chinese: 当埃斯卡洛皮亚大使回家吃午饭时，他的妻子吓了一跳。
lines.raw: When the Ambassador of Escalopia returned home for lunch, his wife got a shock. | 当埃斯卡洛皮亚大使回家吃午饭时，他的妻子吓了一跳。

lines.english: He looked pale and his clothes were in a frightful state.
lines.chinese: 他脸色苍白，衣服也糟透了。
lines.raw: He looked pale and his clothes were in a frightful state. | 他脸色苍白，衣服也糟透了。

lines.english: 'What has happened?' she asked.
lines.raw: 'What has happened?' she asked. | “出什么事了？”她问道。

lines.english: 'How did your clothes get into such a mess?'
lines.raw: 'How did your clothes get into such a mess?' | “你的衣服怎么搞得这么乱？”

lines.english: 'A fire extinguisher, my dear,' answered the Ambassador drily.
lines.chinese: “灭火器，亲爱的，”大使干巴巴地回答道。
lines.raw: 'A fire extinguisher, my dear,' answered the Ambassador drily. | “灭火器，亲爱的，”大使干巴巴地回答道。

lines.english: 'University students set the Embassy on fire this morning.'
lines.chinese: “今天早上大学生把大使馆点着了。”
lines.raw: 'University students set the Embassy on fire this morning.' | “今天早上大学生把大使馆点着了。”

lines.english: 'Good heavens!' exclaimed his wife.
lines.raw: 'Good heavens!' exclaimed his wife. | “天哪！”他的妻子惊呼道。

lines.english: 'And where were you at the time?'
lines.raw: 'And where were you at the time?' | “那你当时在哪里？”

lines.english: 'I was in my office as usual,' answered the Ambassador.
lines.chinese: “我像往常一样在办公室里，”大使回答道。
lines.raw: 'I was in my office as usual,' answered the Ambassador. | “我像往常一样在办公室里，”大使回答道。

lines.english: 'The fire broke out in the basement.
lines.raw: 'The fire broke out in the basement. | “火灾发生在地下室。

lines.english: I went down immediately, of course, and that fool, Horst,
lines.chinese: 我当然立刻下去了，然后那个傻瓜霍斯特，
lines.raw: I went down immediately, of course, and that fool, Horst, | 我当然立刻下去了，然后那个傻瓜霍斯特，

lines.english: aimed a fire extinguisher at me.
lines.raw: aimed a fire extinguisher at me. | 把灭火器对准了我。

lines.english: He thought I was on fire.
lines.raw: He thought I was on fire. | 他以为我着火了。

lines.english: I must definitely get that fellow posted.'
lines.chinese: 我一定要把那个家伙调走。”
lines.raw: I must definitely get that fellow posted.' | 我一定要把那个家伙调走。”

lines.english: The Ambassador's wife went on asking questions,
lines.raw: The Ambassador's wife went on asking questions, | 大使夫人继续提问，

lines.english: when she suddenly noticed a big hole in her husband's hat.
lines.chinese: 突然她发现丈夫的帽子上有一个大洞。
lines.raw: when she suddenly noticed a big hole in her husband's hat. | 突然她发现丈夫的帽子上有一个大洞。

lines.english: 'And how can you explain that?' she asked.
lines.raw: 'And how can you explain that?' she asked. | “那你怎么解释那个？”她问道。

lines.english: 'Oh, that,' said the Ambassador.
lines.raw: 'Oh, that,' said the Ambassador. | “哦，那个，”大使说道。

lines.english: 'Someone fired a shot through my office window.
lines.chinese: “有人朝我办公室窗户开了一枪。
lines.raw: 'Someone fired a shot through my office window. | “有人朝我办公室窗户开了一枪。

lines.english: Accurate, don't you think?
lines.raw: Accurate, don't you think? | 够准的，不是吗？

lines.english: Fortunately, I wasn't wearing it at the time.
lines.raw: Fortunately, I wasn't wearing it at the time. | 幸好，我当时没戴着它。

lines.english: If I had been, I would not have been able to get home for lunch.'
lines.chinese: 如果我当时戴着，我就不能回家吃午饭了。”
lines.raw: If I had been, I would not have been able to get home for lunch.' | 如果我当时戴着，我就不能回家吃午饭了。”
